articles.title: Xiaomi 17T series lands in China, 17T gets battery boost
articles.description: Following their global launch last month, the Xiaomi 17T and 17T Pro have now made their way to the Chinese market with one major upgrade for the vanilla 17T. It gets the same 7,000mAh Si/C battery as the Pro model. For those keeping track at home, that’s a 500mAh boost compared to the global version. Charging is still capped at 67W. Outside of the battery boost on the 17T, and the additional 16GB RAM option on the 17T Pro, the Chinese variants offer the same core specs as the international models. Xiaomi 17T and 17T Pro key specs (machine translated) The 17T gets a 6.59-inch...

articles.title: Nissan Gravite MPV Price Hiked In India; Here's What It Costs Now
articles.description: Nissan has increased the Gravite MPV's prices by up to Rs 18,000 in India, with the seven-seater now priced between Rs 5.73 lakh and Rs 9.08 lakh.

articles.title: NEET UG 2026 re-exam under unprecedented security with question paper setters in strict isolation and multi-layer monitoring by NTA
articles.description: Following concerns over a paper leak in NEET-UG 2026, the government and NTA have introduced an unprecedented security framework for the June 21 re-exam. Over 500,000 security personnel, biometric checks, facial recognition, and live CCTV monitoring have been deployed across India and abroad. Question paper setters are kept under strict isolation, and social media is being monitored to prevent misinformation, ensuring a fair, transparent examination for over 2.2 million aspirants nationwide this year in India.

articles.title: Google quietly installs 4GB AI model through Chrome; here’s how to remove it
articles.description: Privacy advocates have raised concerns after discovering that Chrome has been downloading Google’s Gemini Nano AI model to some devices without obvious notifications.

articles.description: SpaceX IPO: SpaceX employees are set for a major financial boost. As the company prepares for its public listing, stock grants are now worth millions. This wealth transfer is reaching engineers, welders, and other staff. Many workers who held onto their shares will see their fortunes change dramatically. This event marks a significant moment for employee wealth creation in the tech sector.

articles.title: Affordable cars with DCT under Rs 12 lakh: Tata Altroz, Syros & more
articles.description: Dual-clutch automatic gearboxes have become increasingly accessible in India, with several budget-friendly hatchbacks, sedans and SUVs now offering the technology. Known for their fast gear changes and responsive performance, DCT transmissions provide a more engaging driving experience than many traditional automatic setups. As a result, buyers no longer need to move into the premium segment to get this feature.

articles.title: OnePlus Turbo 6X and Turbo 6X Pro to debut on June 10
articles.description: Last week, OnePlus revealed the design and key features of its upcoming Turbo 6X series. The company has now confirmed the launch date for the Turbo 6X and Turbo 6X Pro in China. According to an announcement on OnePlus' official Weibo account, the Turbo 6X series will debut in China on June 10. OnePlus has already disclosed several key specifications of both smartphones, and pre-reservations are now live through the company's official online store in China. The OnePlus Turbo 6X is confirmed to feature the MediaTek Dimensity 7360 Super chipset, a 7,000mAh battery, and an LCD...

articles.title: Flipkart Launches EV Assist to Make Electric Mobility More Accessible for Delivery Partners
articles.description: Chennai : Flipkart, India’s homegrown e-commerce marketplace, has recently launched EV Assist, a digital marketplace designed to simplify access to electric vehicles (EVs) for its delivery executives, Wishmasters. Currently available for Flipkart Minutes’ riders across 20+ cities, the launch marks the latest step in Flipkart’s commitment to electrifying its last-mile delivery fleet under the EV100 [...] The post Flipkart Launches EV Assist to Make Electric Mobility More Accessible for Delivery Partners appeared first on FM Live .

articles.title: Auto dealers express confidence for June-August amid cautious optimism
articles.description: A FADA survey reveals Indian auto dealers are cautiously optimistic, with 59.07% expecting growth in the next quarter. May 2026 saw record sales for PVs, 3W, and tractors, with a 9.55% YoY overall growth despite seasonal challenges.

articles.title: Amid AI-led layoffs, Walmart tells employees it will improve their jobs, not replace them
articles.description: As concerns grow over AI-driven job cuts, Walmart is pitching a different vision. The retail giant says artificial intelligence will help employees work smarter rather than make them redundant, as it expands AI tools across its business and trains staff to use technologies including OpenAI's models.

articles.title: AI Czar David Sacks responds to Anthropic’s 10,000-plus word ‘warning’ on dangers of Al, says You compare it to nukes... then...
articles.description: AI safety firm Anthropic warns of existential AI risks, citing recursive self-improvement and potential human obsolescence. This comes after their AI, Claude, wrote over 80% of their code. Despite this, White House AI Czar David Sacks accuses Anthropic of hypocrisy, suggesting their warnings aim for government industry control. Anthropic proposes a global pause on AI development.

articles.title: Jaipur imposes internet ban ahead of major anti-encroachment drive
articles.description: Jaipur administration has imposed a temporary internet ban to maintain law and order ahead of a JDA anti-encroachment drive. The drive aims to widen a road and involves demolishing five religious structures, prompting precautionary measures.

articles.title: Sunday Reboot: Intel support is on its last legs this WWDC
articles.description: WWDC's keynote will celebrate macOS 27 , but it will also be a funeral for Intel Macs. The final countdown for their apps starts tomorrow. If only Apple keynotes gave blunt advice... The introduction of Apple Silicon immediately put a timer on the Intel Mac experience. Apple Silicon was the company's new direction, and that everyone should migrate that way or be left behind. Evolve or die. Except less morbid and that it really dealt with software and hardware support. Continue Reading on AppleInsider | Discuss on our Forums

articles.title: Weekly deals: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra price drops, the Google Pixel 10 Pro XL is still cheaper
articles.description: As a reminder, Amazon pulled Prime Day forward this year and it is now scheduled for June 23-26. The retailer already has early Prime Day deals that you may want to have a peek at. In the meantime, here are the standard deals – no subscription required. The Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra 512GB is down to $1,220, which is a bit lower than it was a couple of weeks ago. The phone is clearly the big seller this generation as the other two S26 models get no discounts at all. We’re highlighting the 512GB model in particular as the 256GB version has a noticeably smaller discount, so it’s only $45 less...

articles.title: iPhone Fold photo leak, Nvidia RTX Spark is official, Week 23 in review
articles.description: Another week, another couple of foldable iPhone stories. The first is a big one, coming straight from Ice Universe; it's a photo of the device in the wild. The photo shows the White/Silver finish of the inaugural foldable and confirms its stocky shape. Another rumor claims the foldable iPhone will have a vapor chamber for cooling. It's not surprising, given that the iPhone Pro models have a vapor chamber. Motorola unveiled the Edge (2026) for the US and Canadian markets. The phone brings a smaller 6.3-inch display than its predecessor and will go on sale on June 11 with a $600 price...

articles.title: Zojila Tunnel breakthrough to create all-weather Kashmir-Ladakh link
articles.description: The final breakthrough of the 13.15-km Zojila Tunnel on June 9 will establish all-weather connectivity between Kashmir and Ladakh. The tunnel, at an altitude of 11,578 feet, will be the world's longest single-tube bi-directional road tunnel.

articles.title: Vivo X300 Ultra review: The closest a smartphone has come to replacing your camera
articles.description: Vivo's X300 Ultra emerges as a formidable contender for smartphone photography enthusiasts, boasting a ZEISS-developed triple-lens system with exceptional consistency and color accuracy. While its premium price tag and optional photography kit cater to a niche market, the device delivers DSLR-like quality, particularly in portrait and zoom capabilities, making it a compelling choice for those prioritizing camera performance.
